summary: Identified 42 core context files with neovim references. 1 purely neovim-specific file (project-overview.md), 4 files with extractable neovim sections, ~15 files using neovim as example data, 1 deprecated file to delete, and corruption artifacts in 3 files. Three-phase plan: fix corruption + delete deprecated file, extract neovim sections, generalize examples.

artifacts.summary: Research report on neovim content extraction from core .claude/ files
